# Repository Governance Notes

This folder stores contributor and automation guidance for repository maintainers.

## Current standards

- Use Issue Forms to collect reproducible and actionable reports.
- Use PR template checklist for quality gates.
- Require `CODEOWNERS` review on protected branches.
- Keep CI green (`lint`, `test:unit`, `build`) before merge.
- Keep CodeQL and Dependabot enabled.

## Ownership and updates

- Workflow policy changes should be reviewed by DevOps owners.
- Template wording should remain concise and user-focused.
- Labels referenced by templates should exist in repository settings.
